title: 10 herbal concoctions for men struggling with baldness
description: Cinnamomum camphora essential oils, also known as camphor oil, has been traditionally used to help with baldness due to its properties that promote hair growth and reduce hair loss. The oil is rich in constituents like borneol, bornyl acetate, and alpha-pinene, which have anti-inflammatory and antifungal effects that help to soothe an itchy scalp and reduce dandruff. This creates an environment conducive to hair growth. To use Cinnamomum camphora essential oils for baldness, mix a few ...
